Name: fMRI Study Dataset
Funding: National Natural Science Foundation of China (Grant No. 32260207)
TaskDescription: Clarifying Removal in Working Memory: fMRI Evidence for updating over Inhibition
Instructions: Participants memorized six letters. In the processing phase, a cue indicated whether to remove a specified letter (cue: /), encode a new letter (cue: a new letter), or maintain the original set (cue: =). In the retrieval phase, participants made an old/new judgment on a probe letter relative to the current memory set.
